reforms.description: The German government aims to restructure public expenditure towards investment to improve supply-side conditions and stimulate economic growth, alongside implementing a tax reform aimed at lower tax rates and broadening the tax base by reducing exemptions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Restructuring public expenditure and tax reform are expected to enhance investment and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government plans to implement the tax reform.
reforms.importance_rationale: The tax reform is classified as a major reform due to its significant impact on the economy.
reforms.source_quote: The following macroeconomic objectives were viewed as feasible in 1986: ... Restructuring of public expenditure towards investment.

reforms.description: The Federal Government adopted a bill on capital investment companies to establish a legal framework for providing risk capital to small and medium-sized businesses not listed on the stock exchange.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Providing risk capital to small and medium-sized businesses is expected to foster innovation and growth in the startup ecosystem.
reforms.status_evidence: The Federal Government adopted the bill.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a legal framework for capital investment is significant but not a major overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The Federal Government adopted a bill on capital investment companies. It was to establish the legal framework for capital investment companies to provide enterprises which are not listed on the stock exchange, above all small and medium-sized businesses, with risk capital in various forms.

reforms.description: The Federal Government adopted a bill to amend the Investment Allowance Act, lifting the ban on simultaneous use of both regional allowances and research allowances to create better incentives for investment in research and development.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Lifting the ban on simultaneous use of allowances is expected to enhance investment in R&D, thereby supporting innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The Federal Government adopted the bill.
reforms.importance_rationale: The amendment to the Investment Allowance Act is significant but not a major reform.
reforms.source_quote: The Federal Government adopted a bill to amend the Investment Allowance Act. It was to lift the ban on the use, at the same time, of both regional allowances and research allowances and to create better incentives for investment in the field of research and development in areas eligible for regional policy promotion.
